name: Pairing Screen — page refresh retains cached pairing code from localStorage

planSteps.description: Navigate to https://onenotify-7593c.web.app and wait for the 6-digit numeric pairing code to appear on the screen.
Note the exact 6 digits currently displayed inside the pairing code box, then refresh the browser page (reload).
After the page reloads, the displayed 6-digit pairing code is identical to the code shown before refreshing, verifying session reuse from localStorage.
